title: Three people observed an elongated UFO hovering over Brasília-DF [1994]

text_preview: MAY 23rd, 1994. Time: 9:00 pm. Duration: more than 1 hour. In the Asa Norte region, in Brasília, Distrito Federal, three people observed, with the naked eye and with binoculars, the moves of an unidentified flying object “just above the clouds”. According to the witnesses, the UFO was shaped like “a pen” being first in the vertical position and then in the horizontal position. The unknown object had blue, red and yellow colors, and it was about 5 km away from the observers. The sighting took place in a sky with few clouds and, when He saw the UFO for the first time, the witness “thought it was
summary: Three witnesses in Asa Norte, Brasília observed a pen-shaped multicolored UFO hovering above clouds for over 1 hour on May 23, 1994.
